overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom showing Link exploring a volcanic landscape at sunset. The character walks steadily through rocky terrain with floating islands visible in the pink sky, eventually reaching steaming geothermal hot springs.

scene_state.functional_zone: open volcanic plain with distant mountain range

events.description: location text 'Lake Darman' appears on screen identifying the area
character turns left toward the rocky valley entrance

agents.ego_description: Link walks steadily across the volcanic plain toward the mountain range, shield visible on his back

entered.detail: large red rocky mountain with steam vents at the peak
rocky islands suspended in the pink sky with waterfalls
geothermal steam rising from the ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide volcanic plain bathed in golden hour light with a pink sky. Link walks across the rocky terrain toward a large mountain range in the distance, with floating islands visible overhead. Steam vents release mist in the background as the location 'Lake Darman' appears on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky valley with tall stone spires

events.description: enters the shadowed rocky valley between tall stone formations
steam from geothermal pools becomes visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: Link continues walking through the narrow valley passage between tall rock spires and formations

entered.detail: tall thin volcanic rock formation rising from the ground
natural stone arch formation in the distance
steep rocky walls enclosing the path

segments.scene_description: Link enters a narrow rocky valley with tall stone spires rising on both sides. The lighting becomes more diffused and shadowed as the sky visibility decreases. The path winds between volcanic rock formations with steam from distant geothermal features becoming visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal hot spring pools with steam vents

events.description: reaches the geothermal pool area with turquoise water and steam
stops at the rocky edge of the hot spring pool

agents.ego_description: Link approaches the steaming geothermal pools and stops at the rocky edge to look down at the turquoise water

entered.detail: turquoise colored hot spring pool with steam rising from the surface
active geothermal vents releasing white steam mist
volcanic rock formation surrounding the pool edge

segments.scene_description: The valley opens up to reveal geothermal hot springs with vibrant turquoise water. Steam rises from the pools and vents as Link walks to the rocky edge and stops to observe the scene. The lighting is darker here with the sun setting, creating a moody atmosphere around the steaming water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a volcanic plain that gradually narrows into a rocky valley before opening onto steaming geothermal springs. It begins with Link walking across a wide, rocky expanse under a pink golden-hour sky, with floating islands drifting above and steam vents misting the distance toward a mountain range. As the path winds forward, the scene shifts into a narrow valley where tall stone spires rise on both sides, causing the lighting to become more diffused and shadowed. The valley then opens up to reveal vibrant turquoise hot springs, where the atmosphere grows moodier as the sun sets. Finally, the camera follows Link to the rocky edge of the pools, where he stops to observe the rising steam and glowing water.
